channel.title: GitHub BitBake Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of BitBake in GitHub

item.title: 1N3/IntruderPayloads
item.description: A collection of Burpsuite Intruder payloads, BurpBounty payloads, fuzz lists, malicious file uploads and web pentesting methodologies and checklists.

item.title: sony/meta-flutter
item.description: Yocto recipes for Flutter Engine and custom embedders
